A surreal landscape of rolling hills with a winding stream, lined by elegant cypress trees and round bushes, with a distant mountain range. Above, a massive planet dominates the sky, surrounded by smaller glowing planets. The scene blends warm and cool tones, painterly textures, and delicate brushwork reminiscent of Renaissance and surrealist masters, with serene composition and dreamlike clarity.
